title: Hybrid-Cloud CaaS Platform
summary: Designed and implemented a hybrid-cloud Container-as-a-Service platform on immutable hosts, enabling fully software-defined, rapid deployments.

title: FoxPath DRS
summary: Built an automation solution that reduced compliance documentation turnaround by up to 1000 percent and seeded a spin-off SaaS effort.

title: Jupiter HCI Platform
summary: Led a transition to scalable disaggregated HCI with SD-WAN and VDI support to serve multi-location engineering operations.

title: Bluestar
summary: Python + Streamlit application that provides read-only Juniper switch visibility—port status, VLAN context, and LLDP neighbors via NETCONF over SSH.

title: HashReport
summary: Command-line tool for generating comprehensive directory hash reports in CSV or JSON, including file metadata and flexible include/exclude filtering for fast, high-volume processing.
